parameters.query: SELECT message_id FROM public.email_classified WHERE classified_at > now() - interval '8 days'
SELECT label FROM public.email_labels ORDER BY times_used DESC LIMIT 50

INSERT INTO public.email_classified (message_id, labels) VALUES ('{{$json.message_id}}', ARRAY[{{$json.labels.map(l => "'" + l.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',')}}]::text[]) ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO NOTHING
